subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast attained to the supreme guidance, although His Holiness the One True God is sanctified and exalted above every existence and free from all attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بهدایت کبری حضرت احدیت هر چند از هر هستی پاک و مقدس و از هر وصفی مبرا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
